etc.purpose: Runtime configuration and dev-tooling assets for OpenMeter — not application source code. Houses seed data pipelines (etc/seed) and local proxy configuration (etc/wiretap) used exclusively for development, testing, and demos.

patterns.name: Environment-variable parameterisation with defaults
patterns.description: All runtime values (tokens, URLs, counts) are injected via ${VAR:default} syntax so configs work out-of-the-box without manual edits.

patterns.name: Benthos/Redpanda Connect pipeline skeleton
patterns.description: Each seed stream follows the identical input.generate + bloblang mapping + output.switch pattern; only the bloblang body differs between streams.
patterns.example: input: { generate: { count: 0, interval: ... } } / pipeline: { processors: [{ bloblang: ... }] } / output: { switch: [...] }

patterns.name: CloudEvents 1.0 envelope
patterns.description: Every generated event must include specversion, id (UUID), type, source, subject, time, and datacontenttype. Dimensional attributes go inside data: {}, not at the root.
patterns.example: { specversion: '1.0', id: uuid_v4(), type: 'api-requests', source: 'seeder', subject: ..., time: now(), data: { tokens: ... } }

patterns.name: Contract binding to generated OpenAPI spec
patterns.description: etc/wiretap points contract at the generated api/openapi.yaml (v1 spec), not at v3. Redirects use host.docker.internal, not localhost.

key_file_guides.role: Benthos pipeline entrypoint: imports all stream configs from etc/seed/streams/ and wires observability.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding new streams requires a corresponding entry here; missing imports silently skip that stream.

key_file_guides.role: Reference implementation of the seed stream skeleton for HTTP API request events.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Copy this skeleton verbatim for new event types; deviating from the input.generate + output.switch shape breaks the pipeline.

key_file_guides.role: Shared Benthos metrics/tracing config included by seed.yaml.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not duplicate in individual stream files.

key_file_guides.role: Wiretap proxy config for Docker-local v1 API contract validation.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must target api/openapi.yaml (v1), not api/v3/openapi.yaml; redirectURL must use host.docker.internal.

anti_patterns: Hardcoding OPENMETER_TOKEN or OPENMETER_BASE_URL — always use ${VAR:default}
Setting count > 0 in generate — seed streams must run indefinitely
Putting dimensional attributes outside data: {} — they belong in data, not at CloudEvent root
Pointing wiretap contract at api/v3/openapi.yaml — wiretap here validates v1 traffic only
Using localhost instead of host.docker.internal for redirectURL in the wiretap Docker config

decisions.decision: Seed streams share an identical Benthos skeleton with only the bloblang mapping varying
decisions.rationale: Keeps all streams structurally uniform so operators can read, copy, and modify any stream without learning a new pipeline shape.

decisions.decision: Subject space bounded by SEEDER_SUBJECT_COUNT modulo rather than purely random UUIDs
decisions.rationale: Produces a realistic bounded set of subjects (mimicking real tenants) instead of an ever-growing cardinality that would skew meter aggregations in demos.
